introSection: Spin-O-Rama is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Cliff's Amusement Park in Albuquerque, New Mexico, USA. It opened on April 16, 2016.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Spin-O-Rama is an SBF Visa Group spinning roller coaster with a figure 8 layout.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: In each car, the two rows sit back-to-back.

fullText:
Spin-O-Rama is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Cliff's Amusement Park in Albuquerque, New Mexico, USA. It opened on April 16, 2016.

Spin-O-Rama is an SBF Visa Group spinning roller coaster with a figure 8 layout.

In each car, the two rows sit back-to-back.
